text:
In the first image, I feel a gentle anticipation—the spaciousness invites thought and reflection, and the emptiness is both calming and a little eerie, as if I have arrived before anyone else. I sense potential; the scene feels like a prologue.

In the second image, I am energized—the bright colors and bold graphics pull me in, and the wall of text and objects stimulates my curiosity. This is a place meant for inquiry and engagement, urging me to ponder the partnership of research and development. I feel a sense of belonging as a seeker of knowledge, alive to the buzz of ideas around me.
